minimum_evidence_package: Primary-source map; claims and contradictions; scenario model; risk and option ledger
primary_metrics: Decision latency; claim support; scenario robustness; unresolved-risk visibility

institutional_decision_or_action: Approve, restrict, pilot, or reject an AI system for a defined workflow
minimum_evidence_package: Equal-budget task runs; data boundary; security and policy evidence; cost and reliability ledger
authority_boundary: Procurement, risk, legal, security, and business owner
primary_metrics: Replay rate; policy-pass rate; false acceptance; total cost; exit readiness

institutional_decision_or_action: Propose and validate a patch or release candidate
minimum_evidence_package: Diff; tests; dependency and provenance records; rollout plan; rollback target
primary_metrics: Test pass; regression rate; change-failure rate; rollback readiness; review time

institutional_decision_or_action: Turn a defensive finding into a safe reviewable remediation
minimum_evidence_package: Finding evidence; minimal patch; secret-safe logs; policy checks; incident and rollback record
primary_metrics: Finding validity; secret leakage=0; external scans=0; replay; safe PR acceptance

institutional_decision_or_action: Prioritize hypotheses and design falsifiable experiments
minimum_evidence_package: Literature provenance; contradiction graph; experimental controls; assay plan; uncertainty ledger
authority_boundary: Scientist, lab, IRB/safety, or domain authority
primary_metrics: Hypothesis quality; assay reproducibility; negative controls; cost per informative result

institutional_decision_or_action: Recommend bounded interventions for resilience, energy, logistics, or operations
minimum_evidence_package: Baseline; sensor/model provenance; intervention scenarios; sensitivity, safety, cost, and rollback
primary_metrics: Baseline fidelity; scenario sensitivity; pilot safety; measured outcome; recovery time

institutional_decision_or_action: Compare policy options and implementation consequences
minimum_evidence_package: Primary law and guidance; stakeholder map; impact scenarios; dissent and claim boundary
primary_metrics: Source freshness; contradiction coverage; distributional impact visibility; review trace

institutional_decision_or_action: Test strategic claims, dependencies, synergies, and failure conditions
minimum_evidence_package: Claim matrix; source room; red flags; counterfactuals; integration and value-realization conditions
primary_metrics: Unsupported-claim reduction; risk discovery; option value; condition coverage; decision speed

institutional_decision_or_action: Commission, execute, validate, challenge, and prepare settlement for machine labor
minimum_evidence_package: Identity; job charter; coalition record; receipts; validator opinions; dispute and allocation intent
authority_boundary: Human settlement authority or governed contract boundary
primary_metrics: Proof completeness; validator independence; dispute rate; contribution fidelity; settlement latency

institutional_decision_or_action: Generate public artifacts from proof-aligned source without direct website editing
minimum_evidence_package: Source lineage; deterministic build; link and claim QA; visual regression; human-review PR
primary_metrics: Broken links=0; unsupported claims=0; visual defects=0; provenance completeness
